publicV1.reason: No /v1 operation, request/response schema, status code, or error body changes. /v1/runtime-models/query stops recurring 503 only because the deployment gate env (CAP_TASK_MODEL_SELECTION_ENABLED / CAP_TASK_MODEL_SELECTION_ATTESTATION_JSON) is now populated by the upgrade seams; the gate evaluator, RuntimeModelPreflightError projection, and every wire contract are untouched.

mcp.reason: No MCP tool, argument, result, registration, or transport change. The model-aware MCP paths keep their existing gate assertion; only the deployment-side probability of the gate being open changes.

openapi.reason: The OpenAPI projection covers Public V1 only and nothing it projects changes; release assets and upgrade scripts are outside the projection.

apiPlayground.reason: The Playground catalogs Public V1 operations only and gains no entry from CI attestation generation or upgrade-seam consumption.

internalOnly.reason: Adds scripts/generate-task-model-attestation.mjs (single-instance cap-api-1 attestation bound to the release GIT_SHA, honesty split: only compatibilityChecksPassed from the verified N-1 compat check-run), wires generation + fail-closed verification into release.yml/release.sh, and teaches both upgrade seams (scripts/upgrade.sh and apps/api/src/self-update) to download, checksum-verify, precondition-check, and atomically persist the gate env keys so the task-model-selection gate stays open across upgrades.
